title: phaius longicornu
intro: Phaius longicornu, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phaius longicornu include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Phaius longicornu can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
